subtitle: Marie away, James returning Thursday, IM Principles URL live today
context: Marie Cooksey is on annual leave 8-12 June and will be unavailable for all approvals and project oversight. James Salas Guillen returns Thursday 18 June from annual leave starting 5 June. Michael O'Sullivan returns today (Monday 8 June) from out-of-office. The IM Principles URL change goes live today - the old page comes down 23-24 June, so Laura Porter's URL updates must be confirmed live before end of day. DTP1092 College Staff in PXD Proposal has pending Marie comments awaiting your response. The Halo ER Case Management Support Operating Model approval is blocked pending Natasha Heaton's product owner return from sick leave. DSE user data import to Cardinus went live 3 June via James Salas Guillen's interface, but contractor manual record creation responsibility needs confirmation. H&S Handover document from James Salas Guillen outlines outstanding items you and Christopher Sanders are covering during his absence.

urgent.title: IM Principles - verify URL live today
urgent.sub: Laura Porter confirmed new URL goes live today with old page decommissioning 23-24 June. Confirm new URL is accessible and update all PXD links immediately.
urgent.subject: IM Principles - change to URL

urgent.title: Marie Cooksey unavailable all week
urgent.sub: Marie is on annual leave 8-12 June. DTP1092 College Staff in PXD Proposal has her pending comments awaiting your response. Any items requiring her approval on projects, volunteer reporting queries, H&S Management System weighting feedback, or DSE process documentation updates must wait until she returns.
urgent.subject: Annual Leave - Marie

needs.title: Halo ER Case Management approval blocked
needs.sub: Natasha Heaton's product owner is still off sick. Review meeting cannot be scheduled until the product owner returns. Check in with Natasha on expected return date.
needs.subject: RE: Halo ER Case Management Support Operating Model - Approval Confirmation

needs.title: Contractor manual records - confirm ownership
needs.sub: DSE user data import from PeopleXD to Cardinus is live since 3 June. James Salas Guillen is monitoring contractor account creation requests. Confirm who is responsible for creating manual records for contractors etc., and update process documentation.
needs.subject: RE: DSE Update - user data import and upload to Cardinus

needs.title: Review H&S Handover - James Salas Guillen
needs.sub: James leaves today for annual leave until 18 June. H&S Handover document outlines outstanding items. You and Christopher Sanders are covering H&S support queue and escalations in his absence. Review handover immediately to identify priority actions.
needs.subject: H&S Handover

fyi.sub: HR Systems Communications requesting contributions for June 2026 bulletin to PeopleXD and HR reporting tools user community.
fyi.subject: Call for content - HR Systems Bulletin (June 2026)

fyi.sub: Tracy Fahey confirms HR staff updates document now live on internal portal.
fyi.subject: RE: Trinity term HR Policy newsletter

fyi.title: Access PeopleXD training - final sessions June
fyi.sub: Access Group running online training sessions this month. Last chance to join.
fyi.subject: Last chance to join our PeopleXD online training sessions in June

fyi.sub: CorityOne GX2 release now available with refreshed interface.
fyi.subject: Your GX2 2026.2 Release is Here with Refreshed Navigation and Smarter AI

low.sub: Matching your saved criteria from external job board.

low.sub: ITS offering 6-7 July. Spaces still available.
low.subject: [ict-a] Windows Server Security Course - July 2026

calTomorrow.title: Annual Leave - Marie Cooksey
calTomorrow.sub: Marie is on leave 8-13 June. Any items requiring her approval or sign-off must wait until she returns. Kevin and Chris are covering H&S support queue and OSM escalations.
calTomorrow.alert: Marie unavailable all week - action DTP1092 comments and volunteer reporting queries independently

absences: Michael O'Sullivan - out of office, returning Monday 8 June 2026
James Salas Guillen - annual leave from 5 June, returning Thursday 18 June 2026
